entityTypes.name: tech_debt_items
entityTypes.description: Individual technical debt items identified from code review findings and quality metrics

area.description: Module, service, or component where the debt exists

severity.description: Debt severity: low, medium, high, or critical

description.description: What the debt is and why it matters

evidence.description: Data backing this debt item — review findings, metrics, or patterns

status.description: Debt lifecycle status: identified, acknowledged, planned, or resolved

entityTypes.name: quality_trends
entityTypes.description: Per-module, per-period quality metric trends tracked over time

period.description: Time period for this trend snapshot (e.g., 2025-W03, 2025-01)

metrics.description: Quality metrics object with coverage, complexity, and duplication values

trend_direction.description: Trend direction: improving, stable, or degrading

notes.description: Analyst notes on the trend or contributing factors
